headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if ESG momentum stalls and peer funds rebalance away at stake — Adani Power receives 'Aspiring' ESG recognition from NSE Sustainability, enhancing disclosure credibility
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no penalty, but improved disclosure reduces regulatory scrutiny.
Potential for modest P/E support; no immediate margin or revenue impact.
Marginally positive; could reduce cost of capital by 10-20bps if sustained, but no immediate bond spread impact.
